textByHashes.deeb67177d8b584e2bd8805a35dfa2cd56791220: Where am I? Who are you?
textByHashes.b6c52b39ed82f907dcbd4e99b667b7abba65d2e8: I'm Cyrisus. Oh yes, I remember, I was on the island and...
textByHashes.e771a7dc71ee869282b7965f616ed2f49d383967: They attacked! I ran and ran. I crawled down here.
textByHashes.e89edae3d223c8ebebb906c63e62669af10b6db0: Oh my head hurts. And my legs. I'm so tired.
textByHashes.657901ad5edb4fc5bc0e130da36f80d03806be7a: Please, just leave me, I'm a waste of effort, my body is in ruin.
textByHashes.4c6b1e71aaf9ccf6a224e6f30879b54e648aeb4e: Thank you . I would surely be dead without you.
textByHashes.8891a214dbaff01c7c8d47a529e485de3ec35d2e: Exploring. I greatly enjoy travelling the world and taking in all the experiences available.
textByHashes.fb2aaa10d71d140b624ff59707424ae4acdcffc1: Well, I've travelled from the frozen wastes in the Wilderness to the pyramids of the Kharidian Desert. I've lived with the monkeys of Ape Atoll and dined with the TzHaar under the volcano of Karamja.
textByHashes.730f4a70d2756d400a6f91043406929532f20738: I could smith you full rune, farm spirit trees and still have time to cook you a summer pie for tea.
textByHashes.857b31b5e2874dcebb4469f8429eddfce23b9cd8: Please, let's leave that line of conversation.
textByHashes.b570003994a306fc64dcca3ba2f4ceb7c09735ee: I still don't feel fit enough to go outside. I could also do with some armour.
textByHashes.f2d48321e5b61b1098ed49e088ce2a6454ea2df8: Oh, there's really no need to worry.
textByHashes.958f604a18b5e31a694528ab5cbb18adc744ed0a: Trust, me, there's no need. Please, just go to the bank on this island, I have a friend working there. Just tell him I sent you.
textByHashes.82d2f833171ad6d387b1c1268d40bc72a5784e69: Trust me: when you see him, you'll know.
textByHashes.3ad3348d3e5df7eb34246acd1aea830b45189fc0: Oh, and if you want, you can contact me with the NPC Contact spell in the Lunar Spellbook. It might save you running back and forth.
textByHashes.fd3c847c24829dcac9307afc39b3426dadcd3319: It would be good, yes. You should be able to talk to my friend in the bank on this island.
textByHashes.31be50735bc12580b847d8f5705d11b27c87e258: Hi! Managed to get my armour yet?
textByHashes.8bfbfae1baf748a7e26e23c2d8873ec2560dc247: Well, I would appreciate it if you could hurry.
textByHashes.53a7671e32e7753bd95b8b4f25bf94aa558b3740: Okay, I'll try it on. No peeking!
textByHashes.753c84fe83aae168ca5fa1b82aa76eaaeffccfba: I've put the clothes back in the chest, they're not too bad.
textByHashes.ad48a33fbc63cb47b191f0016c8c9b49fdc5623c: But not too good either. I need a different combination.
textByHashes.27de527e20404b7ef1142485e33436c9e17ebfbe: I can't stand the item of headgear you've chosen - get rid of that straight away!
textByHashes.d0660a9fb3115d91cc97bc081ccaf31b18616830: What's with the body armour? Totally not my style!
textByHashes.aece2b3c849d1305ab4e7911d2494a78379259f1: I'd much rather have something else protecting my legs.
textByHashes.c9c7e84fa503b6c91e2e6021d4d9645018c6ea8d: The footwear has to go. I can't rely on them to help me.
textByHashes.cd44cdb16575b4e7c711aa99bcaf39734cb9ace7: I'm not all that good at using the type of weapon you offered. Please bring something else.
textByHashes.29be6815ab5b08cc6265eeb4ccca6711957a1a19: Perfect! I couldn't ask for a better set-up!
textByHashes.440d93d5d1f991634ecec5dfa94cb1bcddd0497c: Perfect! I feel healthy, I'm positively charged and I'm dressed like a war machine!
textByHashes.a3b74a168998966f2d9ec2a93072c28e57430f10: Why thanks, I feel it too!
textByHashes.f4f4d7ea9714d516ebb2ad93f0d38ce3c9d46db3: Ah, well. Best I tell you. The thing is... the thing that I should say... the problem I have, for which you should know...
textByHashes.4ab6e5a3f09bd775517166046439ddfb4cf8682d: I've tried so hard over the years, but I simply cannot gather the courage to fight monsters.
textByHashes.899538182bffdeaead36dd4176567e9e478f564f: I've learnt the techniques, I've got the equipment. I just get so afraid. My legs turn to jelly, I'm dripping with sweat. All I can do is run.
textByHashes.f9cfbb2cf9f730f251c16247e82dc66dce4dd3b0: I know it seems bad, but honestly, I've tried. It was part of the reason I came to Lunar Isle to see the Moon Clan. I trust you've gone through the ceremony to visit the Dreamland?
textByHashes.6368b280631f8b6d922d612daf3235dd35d6287b: Yes, so I came to the Moon Clan again to see if they could help me visit my dreams again and conquer my fear of combat. But then I came across the suqah.
textByHashes.dcc8e9cce06c3818d9b127b17b5903a3cfee9cf9: Say, would you come with me to the Oneiromancer? Perhaps you can give me some support or guidance?
textByHashes.384474286841f40d69b69d19432684b5840daa3e: Excellent! Please, you go on ahead, I'll make my way there myself. I'm not walking out of this cave past those suqahs again!
textByHashes.7cecdfb498bd3f79c8ba3729bc344ea307e3cf55: Of course! You just go speak with the Oneiromancer and I'll be right with you, faster than you'd think.
textByHashes.4c9484ccc30a00426a94655217eda480180116d4: Good. We were hoping you could help us.
textByHashes.8decfccaff047164e793cb047a0491bc51dad0be: I need to get over my fear of combat. Surely I can sort that out in the Dreamland?
textByHashes.14fcacc9d4fa116a6cb1934b27f2d01ac9b9aac3: Okay, I shall just take your word for that bit, but I still can't see the dangerous part...
textByHashes.2e18827ce9a0e5fa088085bf3433ceb08039715e: I'm not so sure about this anymore.
textByHashes.a376409db379ade4ebc3f043d62a7a02a38bb143: Wait. Do we need to wear the clothes we had to wear to go to the dreamland before.
textByHashes.58a2646496161a08e7156f6c8ad7073101c068c4: Hi . I must admit to being a bit nervous. Could you talk to the Oneiromancer? I want to get this out of the way quickly.
textByHashes.6d3fc3d52e4846ad54ae5c99051cdb9d8c981fae: Best you light the brazier with a tinderbox first, then give me the potion.
textByHashes.88f176aff7d9bf16df1e4d5916f95903b33071ab: Let me know when you're ready.
textByHashes.21d850ecd1481b163c4eeec55c1e92638104e976: Yes. Water, goutweed and one astral rune all in that...
textByHashes.12549b2f3126ab960ef4120609526e30a3795bb1: Wait, where did you put the vial?
textByHashes.92c86e08484601f97d267e6b1e80a5cf46f21ca8: Ask the Oneiromancer nicely, I'm sure she will have another.
textByHashes.20c6a2d3f2cc28011ff41ee3414922e48efd944d: Yes. Water, goutweed and one astral rune all in that tiny vial.
textByHashes.07fe153785a15fb3435bee2ae4d64366883a3336: I'm guessing we're going to be fighting my fears.
textByHashes.8764058c1b68bb8d324a305480f071b2c3aebafd: I'm still scared. Show me how you fight, and I should gain courage.
textByHashes.9a5c388cf743f5851f5cc85b04b8d4dd7a74ec28: It looks like there is a little potion left in the bottle.
textByHashes.08c4cb1af2b66430ac7041198f050db762aa88f8: That may be the case, but you need to light the brazier with a tinderbox first.
textByHashes.548a8b511a4d8e9180a0987cfc9193a369b85082: Oh, I can't attack. I'm too afraid!
textByHashes.9fe5cccb991218bf5cf772493798e0ac9aec54bd: I'm building up my courage. I'll attack soon.
textByHashes.6831d1b55f710721237f224eb1bc904a692aea5e: I don't know if I can do this.
textByHashes.9155a0ecdc9f1ff905e48f18ed0c84503a99825d: No, WE did it. Thank you . It really is appreciated.
textByHashes.34e2f3f96761e9da911048de877cff695083cda2: Well I'm not sure I enjoyed almost getting killed, but yes, it was good.
textByHashes.fdf784a2cca9d2c1e5775ba7026d528694620f46: Yes, I've conquered my fear of combat.
textByHashes.fbc3eaa722d7285c5f6ee2dca6ca8f5fd1f6c787: We sure did! I was very afraid to start off with, but once I saw how you dealt with combat I felt sure I could do it too.
textByHashes.b4da78a46afd475429a3ef7fe8d1a6ff2201ccbc: Thank you . I really couldn't have done it without your help. Please, let me pass some of my knowledge onto you.
textByHashes.45597e006f5b6c1a14ecedeaf29e4115d911f901: Ah, sorry but could you do me a favour and clear some inventory space first?
textByHashes.a358976e818f4868219f8eb2f46dd55c32c58304: On my last visit to this island I spent a good while with the Moon Clan. It seems it isn't all that impossible to instantly transfer knowledge to one another.
textByHashes.1cd2a64b05b8a3fd0ad33c7890cb122da7550250: I shall just use lunar magic to pass some information onto you.
textByHashes.6556aa90e83aa8cb6afcaec66b9798bc30164bb0: Just keep your mind blank, relax and hold still.
textByHashes.4bf9beb2463a7106955fe71d32a14cdb5672ddc8: My pleasure. And I best be off, I think I am going to put my courage to the test! I have a new goal to reach - the ultimate warrior!
textByHashes.47ff07b2e07b24daf24b6bc051ffe115e4ae9629: I will. I'll see you around, I'm sure!
textByHashes.c08c14b043df81700d1f5dc5ead240299ad5b164: Ah, . Good to hear from you. Who's this Lucien you speak of?
textByHashes.517cdf10d7168daad126682296189f3a311f178e: What other challenges are there for an adventurer? If there's help I can offer, then offer it I shall!
textByHashes.c826010dbd85909210340250cd7214f2ff5d4611: Then I shall join you there.
textByHashes.3e11a61917d359d11b0df426bc2599ca9a93397f: Well, this is all quite exciting. It's an illustrious group that you've invited me to join.
textByHashes.b80ca47325daa38eb090a6d1ed14e48cccfaab4d: I suppose I've not done badly. Still, without you, I'd be nothing more than a coward. Thank you, friend. I won't let you down.
textByHashes.aa139b3a9de9558bbb819b4efb2772c7d36f1bd4: Erm, I'm a bit busy at the moment.
textByHashes.26295125de3945456bd5251212fc4a5aec97ae4d: Well, I'm trying to fight TzTok-Jad at the moment.
textByHashes.42fe3827c0b7c14b4ccfa720c99645f9a27a47a8: Thanks. Arghhhh, death to you foul beast!
textByHashes.5fae4190eb2b3ed42b174047090240e12161711f: Well, I just dispatched TzTok-Jad. Pretty tough! I'm now on my way to the desert. I'm going to see if I can hunt down this Kalphite Queen everyone's been telling me about.
textByHashes.ad6ef97b831bacfd6b9ed45ab63dea8957660b74: I've already thought of that. I've arranged for a couple of the Slayer masters to join me.
textByHashes.fdcb04a53900a47004210a7507842cc4c18f46ff: That's funny, I was just talking about you.
textByHashes.395e1987538307329c2865fa195afe377463251a: Yes, I've been arranging a meeting between various leaders of Gielinor to discuss some political issues. It seems you have certainly been around a bit!
textByHashes.8fab0238e6181bd6a7e0f35988bae75376a79b3e: Well, I thought I'd try out this place called the Wilderness.
textByHashes.327b5190b0f6ca4978eef00def1f8a560b00742f: He seems to be coming this way.
textByHashes.949868ed1d745b5e61c0520c7f95fdeb6b0b0051: Yes, he's definitely looking at me.
textByHashes.c0bafcbea6c26ee3567762502fe9fbf8df5ac451: Surely not. Oh, look, there's another two of them coming to meet me.
textByHashes.a541e13b60bd6386cad1ab9b00fa831713b2af47: Woah, take it easy! Hey, stop that!
textByHashes.c023ad03ed103403d622b560a2bf7fe1acbd6274: I'll teach you to hit me! Have this!
